title: Wealth fits the life I am building
subtitle: A release-and-allow method for removing the belief that more money will disrupt or complicate what you already have.
excerpt: A short energy statement practice from Day 26 of the MONEY program. Use when part of you suspects that wealth will cost your peace, your simplicity, or the quiet life you have worked to create.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 26 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when wealth feels like a threat to the life you have rather than a support to it.

content.text: A three-minute energy statement practice from Day 26 of the MONEY program. The statement addresses the specific belief that wealth and a simple, peaceful life are incompatible. Say it as a plain declarative.
I am ready to release the belief that wealth will disrupt or complicate the life I am building. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow the knowing that wealth fits the life I am building. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from Day 26 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow framework draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
